title: 9 Pack Assorted Colors Large Bow Hair Clips, 9× 40 cm Satin Hair Bows with Long Tail Hair Ribbons for Women Hair Accessories for Women Girls(9 Colors)
features: Vibrant Color Variety: This set includes 9 large hair bows, each measuring 19× 40cm, in 9 eye-catching colors. From classic neutrals to bold hues, these versatile bows add a fun and stylish touch to any outfit.
High-Quality Material: Crafted from premium fabric, these large hair bow clips are durable and soft, ensuring a comfortable fit for long-lasting wear without any irritation.

Suitable for Any Occasion: Whether it's for casual wear, parties, birthdays, or special events, these oversized hair bows make a perfect accessory to elevate your look and add a charming flair to any hairstyle.

Versatile Styling Options: Ideal for both kids and adults, these bows can be used for a variety of hairstyles, including ponytails, braids, or even as a headband decoration. Their large size makes them a standout accessory.
Easy to Attach: Each bow comes with a secure metal clip, making it simple to attach and remove the bows from your hair without slipping, ensuring they stay in place all day long.
